query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(isSent) as sent, SUM(CASE WHEN isSent=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unsent FROM listings; SELECT id, chatId, active, threadNew, threadInteresting, threadNotInteresting FROM telegramConfig LIMIT 1; SELECT id, platform, title, isSent, status, createdAt FROM listings ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
